sentence: 她的妆容很精致，花了将近一个小时。
pinyin: Tā de zhuāngróng hěn jīngzhì, huā le jiāngjìn yī gè xiǎoshí.
english: Her makeup is very refined — it took her nearly an hour.

sentence: 农民每天早早起床去耕地。
pinyin: Nóng mín měi tiān zǎo zǎo qǐ chuáng qù gēng dì.
english: Farmers get up early every day to plow the fields.

meaning: Be particular about; fastidious; stress; exquisite ; careful study
sentence: 他吃东西很讲究，什么都要最新鲜的。
pinyin: Tā chī dōngxi hěn jiǎng jiū, shénme dōu yào zuì xīnxiān de.
english: He is very particular about food and wants everything to be the freshest.

pinyin: Qǐng yī cì páiduì, bù yào chāduì.
english: Please queue up in order and don't cut in line.

meaning: 1. popular science; 2. popularization of science; 3. abbr. of 科學普及|科学普
sentence: 这个账号专门发科普类视频，很有意思。
pinyin: Zhège zhànghào zhuānmén fā kēpǔ lèi shìpín, hěn yǒu yìsi.
english: This account posts popular science videos specifically, and they're really interesting.
